summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for 10 listed refs. No GitHub mutations are planned directly; security-sensitive refs are quarantined and non-security PRs are kept for their normal proof/review paths.

actions.reason: Open independent bug-fix PR needing proof; keep for normal maintainer/review path.
Open standalone availability bug-fix PR; not duplicate or low-signal under this inventory job.
Useful but not merge-ready contributor PR; draft state, failing proof, and unresolved bot findings block any close or merge recommendation.

Security-boundary-shaped lifecycle hook execution work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope.
The PR is explicitly security-focused and should be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not inventory cleanup.
Substantial useful PR, but failing checks and unresolved/truncated review-bot evidence make only a non-mutating keep classification appropriate.
Rescue watchdog and service repair work touches security and trust boundaries; route to central security handling.
Android/Wear gateway auth and device identity work crosses security-boundary review territory; route centrally.
Open standalone bug-fix PR with useful scope, but failing checks block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout.
